t2_fence: T2 FENCE (Will's ruling 2026-06-12, FENCE_REGISTER F8 sharpened): Arm M builds and certifies multivariate accounts. It carries NO G-claims and NO cross-fixture-invariant claims; any G-test consuming this apparatus is its own future brief with a named mechanism. This clause is law in every Arm M prereg.
t3_note: T3 (ruled): kappa/K_G-class quantities are IN SCOPE as REGISTERED MEASUREMENTS on FX-M-F (HR129's non-recoverability negative is explicitly univariate; the bivariate jet keeps operand height). Measure against the analytic value with a frozen claim; the hunt-format search stays out (F9).
thesis: lane-carried exactness, the difference calculus, the fingerprint law, and the landing decomposition lift from univariate to multivariate (n=2 AND n=3 scored) with the account gaining direction: per-variable attribution, coupling channels, a measurable commutator - every exactness claim staying exact in Q.

vocabulary.coupling_class: a binary node is COUPLING iff its children carry nonempty differing supports (genuinely mixes variables); record carries the dominant class
vocabulary.kink_loci: abs at zero, max at ties: dual eval REFUSES exactly there (HR131 dead-mode stance) - grid-blindness honesty is a pre-registered refusal class
